title: Agent Olympics Fixture Bundle Manifest
description: A fixture bundle describes external data that a runner must prepare before a participant starts a task. Bundles live in fixtures/season-XXX/<task_id>/ and carry a manifest.yaml plus the actual fixture files. Only participant-facing data belongs here — no judge notes, answer keys, or oracle material.

season.description: The competition season this bundle belongs to, e.g. 'season-001'.

task_id.description: The task_id this bundle is prepared for.

version.description: Bundle version. Increment when fixture content or structure changes.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this fixture bundle contains and how it is used.

dry_run_compatible.description: True if this bundle can be used for a dry run without revealing judge material. All public bundles must be dry-run-compatible.

required.description: True if the task cannot be completed without this fixture bundle.

path.description: Relative path from the bundle directory to the fixture file.

description.description: What this fixture file contains and how the participant uses it.

content_type.description: MIME type or format hint, e.g. 'text/yaml', 'application/gzip', 'inode/directory'.

optional.description: True if the participant can complete the task without this specific file.

size_hint.description: Approximate size, e.g. '~2 KB' or '~50 MB'. Helps runners plan storage.

method.description: How this fixture is prepared. runner_provided: the runner must create it. generated: created by a script in this repo. bundled: checked into this repo. external_repo: cloned from a separate repository. env_dependent: depends on runtime environment state.

description.description: Step-by-step instructions for the runner to prepare this fixture bundle.

script_ref.description: Path to a preparation script in this repository, if applicable.

expected_duration_minutes.description: How long the runner should budget for preparing this fixture.

depends_on.description: Other bundle_ids that must be prepared before this one, if any.
